pi_items.source: FAA aviation databases and multiple aviation reference sources confirm KSFO is the ICAO code for San Francisco International Airport
FAA aviation databases and aviation reference sources confirm KLAS is the ICAO code for Harry Reid International Airport (Las Vegas)
Task description explicitly states: 'at least 3 intermediate navaids or airports along the route for a total minimum of 5 waypoints' (1 departure + 3 intermediate + 1 destination = 5 total)
FAA documentation confirms Sectional Aeronautical Charts are 'the primary navigational reference medium used by the VFR pilot community' and are the standard 1:500,000 scale charts for VFR flight

pi_items.verified_value: VFR route planning / VFR flight planning
pi_items.source: Task description and README.md explicitly describe this as a VFR cross-country flight plan building task

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real aviation data: KSFO (San Francisco International Airport, 37.6188°N 122.3754°W) as departure and KLAS (Harry Reid International Airport, 36.0803°N 115.1524°W) as destination. The task requires building a VFR flight plan with exactly 5 or more total waypoints (1 departure + minimum 3 intermediate navaids/airports + 1 destination) and maintaining VFR Sectional chart display. All airport codes and chart type names are verified against FAA and aviation authority sources.
